title: A Question
content:
A voice said, Look me in the stars
And tell me truly, men of earth,
If all the soul-and-body scars
Were not too much to pay for birth.
meaning:
Robert Lee Frost's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Question"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
